name: review-and-merge
title: Review & Merge
description: Review and merge pull requests fast: list your PRs and review requests, approve, and merge or auto-merge in one click.
author: fernando_vilas

commands.name: my-pull-requests
commands.title: My Pull Requests
commands.description: Your open pull requests, grouped by repository.

commands.name: review-requests
commands.title: Review Requests
commands.description: Pull requests awaiting your review, plus ones closed without it.

commands.name: pull-requests-menu-bar
commands.title: Pull Requests Menu Bar
commands.description: Your PRs and review requests in the menu bar; approve and merge from there.

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
preferences.description: Optional. Leave empty to sign in with GitHub (OAuth). To use a token instead, provide one with the `repo` scope and access to the repositories whose pull requests you want to see.

preferences.name: organization
preferences.title: Organization or Owner
preferences.description: Optional. Limit results to this GitHub org/owner. Leave empty to include all your pull requests across GitHub.

preferences.name: repositories
preferences.title: Repositories
preferences.description: Optional. Limit results to specific repositories — a comma- or space-separated list of owner/repo (e.g. octocat/hello-world). Combines with the organization filter (results match any listed repo or org).
